/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX13.1.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=12.7 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/factorial.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/printhello.cpp.o -o main
